ab: mausa’ su’ i inu’?
en: Where are you going?

ab: mausa’ kuwing i pankungs’ kumiyum i papsibaq.
en: I’m going to the office to see the teacher.

ab: mausa’ inu’ i Kawyay?
en: Where is Kawyay going?

ab: mausa’ pakati’ cu siyup i hiya’.
en: He’s going to throw away the trash.

ab: kiya inu’ i Hawan?
en: Where is Hawan?

ab: kiya i lalanguyan i hiya’, mausa’ i macacpung lumanguy kisa’ i hiya’.
ch: B:他在游泳池，他等一下要比賽游泳。
en: He’s at the swimming pool. He’s going to compete in a swimming competition later.

ab: kiya inu’ i Binay? pacacpung maktaliyum kisa’ i hiya’.
ch: A:Binay在哪裡?她等一下要比賽跑步。
en: Where is Binay? She’s going to compete in a running competition later.

ab: kiya i litang i hiya’, halay mu i humuwaw i hiya’.
en: She’s in the auditorium. I’ll go call her.

ab: magalgay ta’ musa’ i paptaliyuman ga!
en: Let’s go to the playground together.

ab: halay kuwing i mabaynay cu kakriaxan han, kiyumaw mi su’ i kisa’.
ch: B:我先去買午餐，等一下去找你。
en: I’ll go buy lunch first, and then I’ll meet you later.

ab: magalgay ta’ musa’ i rumileq cu sibileq ga!
en: Let’s carry the lunch boxes together!

ab: kiyum cuquleq isu’, mausa’ kuwing i kumiyum i papsibaq.
ch: B:你找別人，我要去找老師。
en: You find someone else, I’m going to find the teacher.

ab: Lawsing pacacpung su’ tumuting cu mari’ i kisa’ qu?
en: Is Kacaw competing in croquet today?

ab: iqaat, pacacpung cu mastatayl i hiya’.
en: No, he’s competing in high jump.

ab: riax ka pacacpngan i maktaliyum ga mausa’ su’ i macacpung qu?
ch: A:運動會那天你會上場比賽嗎?
en: Will you compete in the sports day?

ab: uwal ga, pacacpung kuwing cu maktaliyum.
en: Yes, I’ll compete in running.

ab: riax ka pacacpngan i maktaliyum ga mausa’ su’ i macacpung qu?
ch: A:運動會那天你會上場比賽嗎?
en: Will you compete in the sports day?

ab: pacacpung kuwing tumuting cu mari’.
en: I’ll compete in croquet.

ab: riax ka pacacpngan i maktaliyum ga nanuwan ku pakawaw ta’?
ch: A:我們運動會那天要做甚麼?
en: What will we do in the sports day?

ab: papacpung ta’ i mahahuluy cu siniyug.
en: We will compete in tug of war.

ab: riax ka pacacpngan i maktaliyum ga nanuwan ku nananiqun ka paptibinasun ta’?
ch: A:我們運動會要賣食物嗎?
en: Will we sell food at the sports day?

ab: iqaat, patibaynay ta’ cu kikuy.
en: No, we will sell balloons.

ab: magal su’ cu capaang tagi magalayng, lawkah su’ cubalabalay!
ch: A:你獲得了第一名耶，真是厲害！
en: Congratulations on getting first place! You’re amazing!

ab: mahuway su’!
en: Thank you.
